examples: Recovery ships and helicopters are headed for the splashdown area.
Splashdown is expected 300 kilometres west of Valparai so.
Dragon's return to Earth was delayed one day by bad weather in the splashdown zone.
And more recently, in the year 2000, NASA maneuvered a satellite to a splashdown in the Pacific Ocean.
As an aside, NASA also notes that Dragon is still set to arrive back on earth for a splashdown on the 25th, as initially planned.
